mapper.sql: id, member_no, name, phone, password, gender, birthday, email, address, total_consumption, total_points, current_points, balance, register_store_id, status, last_consumption_time, login_count, last_login_time, last_login_ip, created_time, updated_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM member WHERE phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND status != 0
SELECT FROM member WHERE email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND status != 0
SELECT FROM member WHERE member_no = #{memberNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND status != 0
SELECT FROM member WHERE (phone = #{phoneOrMemberNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} OR member_no = #{phoneOrMemberNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND status != 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member ( member_no, name, phone, password, gender, birthday, email, address, total_consumption, total_points, current_points, balance, register_store_id, status, created_time ) VALUES ( #{memberNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gender,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{birthday,jdbcType=DATE}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{totalConsumption,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{totalPoints,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{currentPoints,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{balance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{registerStoreId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET login_count = login_count + 1, last_login_time = #{loginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, last_login_ip = #{loginIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE member SET status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE member SET current_points = #{points,jdbcType=INTEGER}, total_points = #{totalPoints,jdbcType=INTEGER}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM member WHERE phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM member WHERE email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM member WHERE status = 1 AND DAYOFYEAR(birthday) BETWEEN DAYOFYEAR(CURDATE()) AND DAYOFYEAR(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)) ORDER BY DAYOFYEAR(birthday)
SELECT FROM member WHERE status = 1 AND (last_login_time IS NULL OR last_login_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)) ORDER BY last_login_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE register_store_id = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status = 1
